cves.name: Log4Shell
cves.description: December 2021 mein Java ki Log4j library mein mili. Practically poori internet affected thi — Microsoft, Apple, Amazon, Tesla sab.
cves.how_exploit: Attacker yeh string kisi bhi input mein bhejta tha. Log4j ise log karte waqt automatically execute karta tha aur attacker ke server se code download karke run karta tha.
cves.fix: Log4j version 2.17.1+ pe upgrade karo. JNDI lookup disable karo.

cves.name: Heartbleed
cves.description: OpenSSL library mein memory leak bug. Server ki private memory padhna possible tha — passwords, private keys sab.
cves.vulnerable_code:
memcpy(bp, p, payload);
// payload size check nahi tha!
cves.how_exploit: Attacker ek specially crafted heartbeat request bhejta tha jisme payload size zyada hoti thi. Server bina check ke extra memory return karta tha.
cves.fix: OpenSSL 1.0.1g ya usse upar update karo.
cves.fixed_code:
if (payload + padding > s->s3->rrec.length)
    return 0; // Request reject karo

cves.name: SQL Injection Classic
cves.description: Sabse common aur dangerous vulnerability. Database ko directly control karna possible ho jaata hai.
cves.vulnerable_code: query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE name='" + username + "'"
cves.how_exploit:
Username mein dalo: ' OR '1'='1
Query ban jaati hai: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name='' OR '1'='1'
Result: Poora database expose!
cves.fix: Parameterized queries use karo — user input ko query se alag rakho.

cves.name: IDOR - Broken Access Control
cves.description: 2021 mein OWASP #1 vulnerability. URL mein ID change karke kisi aur ka data access karna.
cves.vulnerable_code:
# URL: /profile?id=123
user = db.get_user(request.args.get('id'))
return user.data  # Koi check nahi!
cves.how_exploit: URL mein id=123 ko id=124 karo — kisi aur ka profile dikh jaata hai. Authentication check nahi hai server side pe.
cves.fix: Har request pe server side authorization check karo.
cves.fixed_code:
user = db.get_user(request.args.get('id'))
if user.id != current_user.id:
    return 403  # Forbidden
return user.data

cves.name: Broken Authentication
cves.description: Weak authentication mechanisms jo attackers ko accounts hijack karne deti hain.
cves.vulnerable_code:
# Weak JWT secret
jwt.encode(payload, 'secret', algorithm='HS256')
# Password without hashing
db.save(password=user_password)
cves.how_exploit: Weak JWT secret brute force se crack ho sakta hai. Plain text passwords database leak mein seedha milte hain.
cves.fix: Strong secrets use karo, passwords hash karo, MFA implement karo.
cves.fixed_code:
import secrets
import bcrypt
jwt_secret = secrets.token_hex(32)
hashed = bcrypt.hashpw(password.encode(), bcrypt.gensalt())
